_comments.PRAYER_COOLDOWN: Ticks between successive prayers by same entity.
_comments.PRAYER_DURATION: Ticks the entity remains in prayer state.
_comments.PRAYER_RESPONSE_WINDOW: Ticks after prayer completes to await divine response.
_comments.DIVINE_REGEN_PER_PRAYER: Divine points gained per tick per actively praying entity.
_comments.FAITH_DECAY_PER_YEAR: Faith lost per TICKS_PER_YEAR cycle (natural erosion).
